meta.phase-name: Schema Mutation API Contract and Revision Safety

phase-summary.outcome: Defined mutation safety expectations and connected schema-write/publish actions to dedicated feature flags for controlled rollout.

file.description: Added `ai.schema.mutation-api` and `ai.schema.publish` defaults for controlled enablement.
Added typed flag IDs and evaluation utility used by server paths.

suggestion.gap: Schema publish safety requirements are currently implicit.
suggestion.proposal: Add explicit requirement for immutable revision history and rollback-safe publish workflow.

next.action: Proceed to 50-05 rollout observability and flag-audit requirements.
